contact.address: The Farm VILLA - CM RESIDENCY, Pondicherry

offers.title: Weekday Special Offer
offers.rules: Book a 2-night weekday stay and receive a 25% discount on the total price.

offers.title: Referral Discount
offers.rules: Get a direct ₹1,000 discount when referred by an existing customer.

offers.title: Extended Luxury Escape
offers.rules: Book 4 nights or more, get the last night completely free.

testimonials.comment: Absolutely breathtaking property! The beachfront views, private pool, and exceptional hospitality made this our best family vacation ever. Every detail felt bespoke and luxurious.
An oasis of calm and refinement. The staff was incredibly attentive, the design is modern yet warm, and watching the sunrise from the master bedroom was unforgettable. We will be back!
A true five-star experience. The kitchen was stocked with essentials, the infinity pool is pristine, and the direct beach access was the highlight. Ideal for hosting a private retreat.
